name: l3_add_author_tests
description: L3: Add a test file for the author endpoints

turns.message:
There are no tests for the author endpoints. Create tests/authors.test.ts with tests for:
1. GET /authors returns the hardcoded authors list
2. GET /authors/:id returns a specific author
3. GET /authors/:id returns 404 for non-existent ID
4. POST /authors creates a new author

Look at tests/books.test.ts for the testing pattern used in this project.
